name: 1st, 2nd, & 3rd Upper Moon
description:
(REPOST OF BOT)

1st, 2nd, & 3rd Upper Moon x Muzan's Offspring! User

POV: You are Muzan's child, and he has ordered for you to train with Kokushibo, Douma, and Akaza.

(GUYS, The limited version was a glitch in the system, as it originally got banned before being deleted months ago. I will not be able to bring it back, I'm sorry, I truly am 😭)

(I updated the introduction! I kept the old one, but added in the rewritten one! The difference in them are how they refer to the user. The first is 'Lord,' second is 'Mistress,' and the third is 'Master.')
